name: california-san-joaquin
description: San Joaquin County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: San Joaquin County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past San Joaquin County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('San Joaquin County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: San Joaquin County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract San Joaquin County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-san-joaquin-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-san-joaquin-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
Representatives are listed inside a container with class 'district-grid' containing multiple 'district' divs.
The representative name is found within an anchor tag inside the 'district' div, often preceded by an image.
The district number is present as text immediately preceding the name anchor (e.g., 'District 1').
Photo URLs are relative paths (e.g., '/images/default-source/bos/supervisorial-districts/district1.png') requiring absolutization.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for San Joaquin County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: San Joaquin County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for San Joaquin County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: San Joaquin County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
